page_metadata.biotools__summary:
BioTranslator performs semantic interpretation of genomic data, using pathway analysis and gene prioritization approaches

The tool is available at: 
http://www.biotranslator.gr:8080/
http://motherbox.chemeng.ntua.gr/anastasia_dev/
